subject: [PATCH v2 3/4] memcg: int16_t for cached slab stats

reviews.author: David Laight
reviews.summary: Suggested modifying the code to perform the add operation first, then check if the result is within S16_MAX and PAGE_SIZE before updating the cached value or flushing it directly.

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch series aims to optimize memory cgroup (memcg) performance by reducing the size of cached slab statistics. The first patch in the series changes struct obj_stock_pcp to store cached slab stats in int16_t instead of int, which reduces the metadata size on 64-bit machines. This change is accompanied by an explicit S16_MAX guard to prevent overflow or underflow when accumulating values.
